PowerShell($ok=$false; foreach \($i in 1..18\) { try { docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}}' 2>$null | Out-Null; if \($?\) { $v = docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}}' 2>$null; if \($v\) { Write-Output "Docker daemon UP, server $v"; $ok=$true; break } } } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10 }; if \(-not $ok\) { Write-Output "Daemon not up yet after wait"; wsl --list --verbose })
PowerShell($v = docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}}' 2>$null; if \($v\) { Write-Output "Docker daemon UP, server $v" } else { Write-Output "Daemon NOT up"; wsl --list --verbose })

PowerShell($ok=$false; foreach \($i in 1..15\) { $v = docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}}' 2>$null; if \($v\) { Write-Output "Docker daemon UP, server $v"; $ok=$true; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12 }; if \(-not $ok\) { Write-Output "Daemon still NOT up after ~3min"; Write-Output "=== WSL distros ==="; wsl --list --verbose })
PowerShell($v = docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}}' 2>$null; if \($v\) { Write-Output "UP:$v" } else { Write-Output "DOWN" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; foreach \($i in 1..20\) { $v = docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}}' 2>$null; if \($v\) { Write-Output "Docker daemon UP, server $v"; $ok=$true; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12 }; if \(-not $ok\) { Write-Output "Still NOT up after ~4min"; wsl --list --verbose })
